IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: PLEASE SEE MISSION STATEMENT BELOW: CONDUCTS AND SUPPORTS ACTIVITIES EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE BENEFIT OF EVANGELICAL CHRISTIAN CHURCHES, CHARITABLE RELIEF ORGANIZATIONS
IRS990.MissionDesc: CONDUCTS AND SUPPORTS ACTIVITIES EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE BENEFIT OF EVANGELICAL CHRISTIAN CHURCHES AND CHARITABLE RELIEF ORGANIZATIONS.
IRS990.Desc: SEATTLE YOUTH FOR CHRISTCITY SERVE IS A LOCAL MISSION TRIP EXPERIENCE THAT ALLOWS YOUNG PEOPLE TO LEARN ABOUT GOD'S HEART FOR JUSTICE, WHILE AT THE SAME TIME SERVES THOSE IN NEED THROUGHOUT SNOHOMISH AND KING COUNTY.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: SEATTLE UNION GOSPEL MISSIONIS TO BRING THE LOVE OF JESUS AND HOPE FOR A NEW LIFE TO OUR HOMELESS NEIGHBORS.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: CRISTA CAMPSARE POSITIVE CHRISTIAN FOCUSED CAMPS, ISLAND LAKE AND MIRACLE RANCH, FOR YOUTH, THE NEEDY AND ADULTS.

ProgSrvcAccomActyOtherGrp.Desc: HOPE 4 KIDS INTERNATIONALTO RESTORE VILLAGES IN NEED WITH THE GIFT OF SAFE WATER BY DRILLING DEEP WELLS FOR THE VILLAGES THEY SERVE IN UGANDA, EAST AFRICA.
EAGLE WINGS DISABILITY MINISTRIESTO BRING PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES AND THE COMMUNITY AT LARGE TOGETHER INTO RELATIONSHIP.
FREEDOM CHURCH OF SEATTLETO PROMOTE THE LIFE AND TEACHINGS OF JESUS CHRIST.
KING'S SCHOOLTO PROVIDE AN INSPIRING AND EXEMPLARY CHRISTIAN EDUCATION IN A SPIRITUALLY VITAL, CARING COMMUNITY. ITS MISSION IS ACHIEVED ON THE FOUNDATION OF FOUR ABIDING PRINCIPLES

BELLEVUE CHRISTIAN SCHOOLTO PREPARE YOUNG PEOPLE TO LIVE FAITHFULLY FOR CHRIST IN A RAPIDLY CHANGING WORLD WITH THE ABILITY TO UNDERSTAND, EVALUATE, AND TRANSFORM THEIR WORLD FROM THE FOUNDATION OF GOD'S UNCHANGING VALUES.
MISSION AVIATION FELLOWSHIPSERVING TOGETHER TO BRING HELP, HOPE, AND HEALING THROUGH AVIATION.

OtherSecuritiesGrp.Desc: FED AGRIC MTG NON VTG C
CONS DISCRET SEL SECT SPDR FD
CONS STAPLES SEL SECT APDR FD
GLOBAL X US INF DEV ETF
HEALTH CARE SEL SECT APDR FD
THE TECHNOLOGY SEL SEC SPDR FD

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: DRILLING WELLS FOR SAFE WATER IN AFRICA
SUPPORT MEALS ANF SHELTER WITH SPRITUAL FOCUS
BRINGING PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES TOGETHER INTO RELATIONSHIP
TO PREPARE YOUNG PEOPLE TO LIVE FAITHFULLY FOR CHRIST IN A RAPIDLY CHANGING WORLDWITH THE ABILITY TO UNDERSTAND, EVALUATE, AND TRANSFORM THEIR WORLDFROM THE FOUNDATION OF GOD'S UNCHANGING VALUES.
SERVING TOGETHER TO BRING HELP, HOPE, AND HEALING THROUGH AVIATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ORGANIZATION REVIEWS FORM 990 AT NEXT SCHEDULED MEETING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC DURING THE TAX YEAR UPON REQUEST TO THE ORGANIZATION'S OFFICE.
